title: 18 Pieces Pine Cone Christmas Tree Decorations, Silver Pine Cones, Natural Pinecones with String Pendant Crafts for Garland Xmas Tree Baubles Wreath Gift Tag Hanging Ornaments
features: 【Package Includes】You will get 18pcs Christmas silver pine cones ornament, diameter is approx 3-4 cm, an abundant quantity, enough for you to decorate Christmas wreath and rattan that promote the exciting atmosphere.

【Natural Pine Cones】YUNSTK pine cones pendants are made of high-quality natural wood, all pine cones are natural, non-toxic, and safe, fit for indoor or outdoor decoration. They are universal ornaments for all seasons.

【Pinecones Decorations】They are all-natural pinecones. The size, shape, and color may vary slightly, every Christmas decorative pinecone is unique. Proper size for a bowl, vase, lantern, or hurricane candle display.
【Wide Usage】Perfect for DIY craft, fall and Christmas decoration, can decorate Christmas trees, wreaths, garlands, and DIY craft material, also ideal for wedding, holiday, and party decoration.

【Christmas Decor】Each pine cone is equipped with a shiny silver string, you can hang it on someplace that you want, It is perfect for Christmas, winter, parties, and holiday decorations, and can also be made into wreaths and necklaces to create a unique natural style of home decoration and help add more Christmas atmosphere.
description: Product description 18 Pieces Natural Dried Pine Cones Christmas Pinecones with String Creative Pine Cone Crafts Christmas Tree Party Hanging Decoration Pendant Crafts Christmas Ornament Home Decor Material: Wood Color: Silver Package Includes: 18 x Silver Natural Pine Cones With String (Approximately 3-4cm in length) Features: Reusable Pine Cones - - The dried natural pine cones are very light and will not wilt after a few years and can be reused. You can put creative pinecone crafts away after using decorative pinecones this year and wait for them to be used again next year. Hanging String - - All simple and rustic pine cones have beautiful shiny silver wire loops, which are easy to hang. You can not only hang Christmas pine cones on the Christmas tree but also hang natural pine cones wherever you want to hang them. Easy to Grip - - These pine cones are very suitable for making DIY decorations. Christmas hanging pendants can be used to decorate Christmas trees, Christmas wreaths, rattans, etc, which help increase the Christmas atmosphere. Notes: Please allow 1-2mm error due to manual measurement and make sure you do not mind before ordering. Safety Warning May pose a choking hazard for small children and pets. Keep out of reach of young children and animals.
